title: Ramkund Ghat
content:
Most sacred ghat — where Lord Ram bathed during exile. Primary Kumbh Mela bathing ghat. The Asthi Vilaya Kund is here for final rites immersion.
Facilities: Changing rooms (₹10), Locker (₹20/hr), First aid post, Police post, CCTV surveillance

title: रामकुंड घाट
content:
सबसे पवित्र घाट — जहां भगवान राम ने वनवास के दौरान स्नान किया था। कुंभ मेला का प्राथमिक स्नान घाट।
Facilities: Changing rooms (₹10), Locker (₹20/hr), First aid post, Police post, CCTV surveillance

title: रामकुंड घाट
content:
सर्वात पवित्र घाट — जिथे भगवान रामांनी वनवासात स्नान केले होते.
Facilities: Changing rooms (₹10), Locker (₹20/hr), First aid post, Police post, CCTV surveillance

title: Astivahini Ghat (Asthi Sangam)
content: Used specifically for immersion of ashes (asthi visarjan) of deceased. One of the most sacred places for final rites. Brahmins available for conducting rituals (puja).

title: Kushavart Kund (Trimbakeshwar)
content: The source tank of Godavari River. Second main Kumbh Mela bathing site after Ramkund. Very sacred — bathing here is equivalent to bathing at the source of the river.

title: कुशावर्त कुंड (त्र्यंबकेश्वर)
content: The source tank of Godavari River. Second main Kumbh Mela bathing site after Ramkund. Very sacred — bathing here is equivalent to bathing at the source of the river.
